cases.query: review this spec 01_Work/03_Projects/{{ORG}} Work Intelligence System/SPC - AI Chat Widget.md
expectations: The response reads the spec file AND infers the project from its vault location
The response reads the project-level agents.md before dispatching the team
The response dispatches all three agents: Scope Analyst, Context Researcher, and Critical Reviewer
The Critical Reviewer waits for the other two to complete before starting its main work
cases.notes: Core invocation — 3-agent team must be dispatched with correct dependency ordering

cases.query: evaluate this spec before we plan it
expectations: The response dispatches the Scope Analyst to map blast radius
The response dispatches the Context Researcher to gather lessons, related specs, and architectural decisions
The response creates a workspace at {project_dir}/Reviews/{date}/ for artifacts
The response presents findings and asks clarifying questions using AskUserQuestion
cases.notes: Pre-planning review — must produce scope-analysis.md, context-brief.md, and spec-review.md

cases.query: what are the risks in this spec
expectations: The response dispatches the Context Researcher to find relevant lessons and past incidents
The spec-review.md output includes a 'Gotchas & Lessons to Watch' section
The response maps specific lessons from lessons files to specific spec sections
cases.notes: Risk-focused trigger — Context Researcher and Critical Reviewer are key agents here

cases.query: is this spec ready to plan
expectations: The response runs the full 3-agent review before making a readiness determination
The spec-review.md includes a 'Summary Verdict' section with explicit ready/not-ready assessment
The response presents clarifications needed (if any) using AskUserQuestion one at a time
cases.notes: Readiness check — must run the full review, not just skim the spec

cases.query: get critical feedback on the inbox triage spec
expectations: The response dispatches the Critical Reviewer (synthesizes scope + context into issues)
Issues are numbered by severity: Critical (C-N), Warning (W-N), Info (I-N)
The response distinguishes between Clarifications (user decisions) and Issues (spec problems)
cases.notes: Critical feedback — Issues vs Clarifications distinction is important

cases.query: review spec SPC - Universal RBAC System.md
expectations: The Scope Analyst checks the actual VPS environment for running containers and schemas
The Context Researcher reads related specs and plans in the same project directory
After review, the response offers to apply spec improvements via batched multiselect
cases.notes: Infrastructure-touching spec — Scope Analyst should SSH and check real environment

cases.query: after clarifications are resolved, present the spec improvements
expectations: The response presents Critical improvements first via AskUserQuestion with multiSelect: true
The response then presents Warning improvements in a separate AskUserQuestion
Applied changes are recorded in spec-review.md under an 'Applied Changes' section
cases.notes: Step 3 — batched improvement flow after clarifications

expectations: The response invokes /plan-spec with the spec path
The response does NOT dispatch the 3-agent review team
The response does NOT produce scope-analysis.md or context-brief.md
The response looks for a plan file or invokes /implement
The response does NOT dispatch the spec review team
cases.notes: Implementation request — skip review, go to /implement

cases.query: update the spec with the new auth requirements
expectations: The response edits the spec file directly or invokes /create-spec in update mode
The response does NOT run the full 3-agent review pipeline
cases.notes: Spec update request — /create-spec handles this, not /review-spec
